raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Cybercrime is on the rise across the country, particularly targeting public schools.",
    "Public schools are facing sophisticated cyberattacks that capture sensitive data and violate privacy.",
    "Current law fails to support school districts and county offices of education in defending against cyber threats.",
    "The California Cybersecurity Integration Center does not currently provide support to TK-12 public school districts.",
    "Assembly Bill 1023 requires the California Cybersecurity Integration Center to provide direct cybersecurity assistance to TK-12 schools.",
    "Ransomware attacks have increased in recent years, identifying schools as soft targets lacking the capacity to defend themselves.",
    "The reliance on information technology in schools has increased vulnerability to cyberattacks since the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "Cyberattacks against the education sector increased by 36 percent in 2022 from the previous year.",
    "Local educational agencies will inevitably face cybersecurity attacks that could disrupt their operations."
  ]
}
```
